title: triodia compacta
intro: Triodia compacta, also known as kangaroo grass or spinifex, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia, known for its spiny seed heads. The medicinal properties of Triodia compacta include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Triodia compacta can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it is also used in traditional Aboriginal medicine in various forms, including a powdered extract.
